property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

odejs\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files

testcase.name: getActiveShares_Unauthenticated_ShouldReturn401
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-06T04:43:18.936+05:30 INFO 32332 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.revature.passwordmanager.controller.SecureShareControllerTest]: SecureShareControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-06T04:43:18.952+05:30 INFO 32332 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.revature.passwordmanager.PasswordManagerApplication for test class com.revature.passwordmanager.controller.SecureShareControllerTest 2026-03-06T04:43:18.957+05:30 INFO 32332 --- [ main] o.s.b.d.r.RestartApplicationListener : Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

testcase.name: revokeShare_NotFound_ShouldReturn404
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-06T04:43:20.505+05:30 ERROR 32332 --- [ main] c.r.p.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Resource not found: Share not found

testcase.name: createShare_EntryNotFound_ShouldReturn404
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-06T04:43:20.767+05:30 ERROR 32332 --- [ main] c.r.p.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Resource not found: Vault entry not found

testcase.name: revokeShare_WrongOwner_ShouldReturn400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-06T04:43:20.947+05:30 ERROR 32332 --- [ main] c.r.p.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Illegal argument: Share does not belong to this user

testcase.name: getSharedPassword_InvalidToken_ShouldReturn404
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-06T04:43:20.974+05:30 ERROR 32332 --- [ main] c.r.p.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Resource not found: Share not found or has expired

testcase.name: getSharedPassword_ExpiredShare_ShouldReturn500
testcase.system-out:
